summary: Contractor Labour Management System testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working (18/24 tests passed, 6 skipped due to role-based filtering). Frontend ContractorManagement page fully functional with 3-tab create dialog, 3-tab detail view, and proper header navigation. Previous route conflict issue FIXED - routes renamed from /api/work-orders to /api/labour-work-orders.

minor.issue: 6 tests skipped due to role-based filtering - Site Engineer cannot access contractors/projects lists (expected behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: DialogDescription HTML nesting issue FIXED - now uses asChild prop (line 346 of ContractorManagement.jsx)
Route conflict FIXED - contractors.py routes changed from /work-orders to /labour-work-orders
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed contractors, categories, work orders, attendance entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contractor Labour Management feature fully implemented and tested. All routes use /api/labour-work-orders path (not /api/work-orders). DB collection is labour_work_orders. Frontend ContractorManagement page at /contractor-management works for Planning and Super Admin roles. Header nav has 'Contractors' link for Planning role.

backend_apis.POST /api/contractors: PASS - Creates contractor with labour_types array
backend_apis.PATCH /api/contractors/{id}: PASS - Updates contractor fields with persistence verification
backend_apis.GET /api/contractors/{id}/summary: PASS - Returns contractor, work_orders, recent_attendance, stats
backend_apis.GET /api/labour-work-orders: PASS - Returns 5 work orders, supports ?project_id and ?contractor_id filters
backend_apis.POST /api/labour-work-orders: PASS - Creates work order with payment_stages
backend_apis.POST /api/labour-attendance: PASS - Creates attendance with auto cost calculation
backend_apis.GET /api/labour-attendance: PASS - Returns entries, supports ?project_id and ?date filters
backend_apis.GET /api/labour-attendance/daily-summary: PASS - Returns date, total_workers, total_cost, by_contractor
backend_apis.POST /api/material-inventory: PASS - Creates entry with auto closing_stock calculation
backend_apis.GET /api/material-inventory/latest: PASS - Returns latest stock per material
backend_apis.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/contracto: PASS - Returns 5 labour work orders for project

frontend_ui.New Contractor dialog with 3 tabs: PASS - Basic Details, Labour Types, Account & GST
frontend_ui.Contractor detail view with 3 tabs: PASS - Details & Labour, Work Orders, Payment Summary
frontend_ui.Contractor cards display: PASS - Name, category badge, labour type badges with costs
frontend_ui.Search and filter: PASS - Search field and All Categories dropdown
